login.title: Login to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password to continue.
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
login.onboardingRequired: Finish your company and brand setup to continue.
login.genericError: Unable to sign in. Please try again.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.description: Use your email and password to get started.

credentials.title: Create your account
credentials.description: Start with your email and password.
credentials.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
credentials.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

plan.title: Choose your plan
plan.description: Select a package or apply a redeem code before checkout.
plan.loadError: Unable to load packages right now.
plan.redeemDescription: Have a redeem code? Apply it here first.

summary.title: Registration summary
summary.acceptTerms: I confirm the registration details and want to continue to payment.
summary.missingPaymentLink: Payment link is missing from the registration response.

verify.title: Verify your registration
verify.loading: Checking your payment and verification status...
verify.success: Registration verified. You can sign in now.
verify.invalid: This verification link is invalid or expired.
verify.noEmail: No email is available for resend.

account.title: Complete your account setup
account.description: Finish your company and brand information to activate the workspace.
account.missingEmail: Your onboarding session is missing an email address.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Set a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successMessage: Password updated successfully. You can now login.
